label: Avoiding something
description: Putting off, procrastinating, can't make yourself do it

label: Angry / resentful
description: Can't stop replaying what they did, want revenge, feel wronged

label: Anxious / worried
description: Racing thoughts, can't stop worrying, dread

label: Overwhelmed
description: Too much, can't think clearly, shutting down

label: Low willpower
description: Keep going back to bad habits, can't commit, give in every time

label: Insecure / can't speak up
description: Freeze up, feel judged, can't express yourself

label: Grieving / lost
description: Loss, grief, don't know how to carry it

label: Relationship conflict
description: Hard conversation, feeling unheard, need to say something difficult

label: Panicking / can't breathe
description: Panic attack, feel out of control, need to calm down now
